## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] 🧩 New pattern
- [ ] 🚫 New anti-pattern
- [ ] 🛠️ Stack file (new or updated)
- [ ] 🎭 Role improvement
- [ ] 📐 ADR template improvement
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] 🌐 Translation (AR ↔ EN)
- [ ] 💡 New role (linked Issue: #__)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation only
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor

## Testing

<!-- For script changes only -->

- [ ] N/A — documentation-only change
- [ ] Tested `install.ps1` / `install.sh` manually
- [ ] Tested `bootstrap.ps1` / `bootstrap.sh` manually
- [ ] Code examples in pattern actually work (ran them)

## Quality Checklist

- [ ] No personal data (client names, real paths, credentials, emails)
- [ ] No secrets (API keys, tokens, passwords)
- [ ] Followed template structure for the contribution type
- [ ] Added to relevant index (`Patterns/README.md`, `Anti-patterns/README.md`) if applicable
- [ ] Markdown renders cleanly (no broken tables, malformed code blocks)
- [ ] If new file in English, considered if Arabic version is needed (and vice versa)
